phrases.intent_en: Ask which terminal your flight departs from
phrases.text_local: De quel terminal part mon vol, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: duh kel tehr-mee-NAL par mohn VOL, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Orly has two terminals: Orly 1 (formerly Ouest and Sud, for international and Schengen flights) and Orly 4 (formerly Ouest, for domestic). Always check your boarding pass for the terminal number as the two terminals are not walkable between each other.

responses.english: Check your boarding pass. It is marked on it.
responses.phonetic: vay-ree-fee-AY soor votr kart dahm-bark-MAHN. seh tahn-dee-KAY duh-SOO
responses.french: Vérifiez sur votre carte d'embarquement. C'est indiqué dessus.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the OrlyVal shuttle to the RER stops
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'arrêt de l'OrlyVal pour rejoindre le RER ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah-REH duh lor-lee-VAL poor ruh-ZHWAHN-druh luh air-uh-air
phrases.cultural_note: The OrlyVal automated shuttle connects Orly to Antony station on RER Line B, which goes directly into Paris. The journey to the city center takes about 35-40 minutes total. Orlybus also runs to Denfert-Rochereau (RER B) and is cheaper but slower.

responses.english: The OrlyVal is on level zero, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: lor-lee-VAL eh toh nee-VOH zay-ROH, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: L'OrlyVal est au niveau zéro, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is outside arrivals
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la station de taxis à la sortie des arrivées ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah stah-SYOHN duh tak-SEE ah lah sor-TEE day zah-ree-VAY
phrases.cultural_note: Official taxi ranks are located just outside each arrivals hall — follow the 'Taxis' signs. Only use official licensed taxis from the rank, never private 'taxi' offers inside the terminal. Fixed-rate fares apply from Orly to Paris intramuros (inside the périphérique).

responses.english: Taxis are at the exit, door L.
responses.phonetic: lay tahk-SEE sohn tah lah sor-TEE, port el
responses.french: Les taxis sont à la sortie, porte L.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baggage claim is for your flight
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le retrait des bagages pour mon vol ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh ruh-TREH day bah-GAHZH poor mohn VOL
phrases.cultural_note: Baggage claim (livraison des bagages) carousels are indicated on the arrival screens. Baggage trolleys are free at Orly — unlike some airports. The lost luggage desk (bagages perdus) is adjacent to the baggage hall if your bag does not arrive.

responses.english: Baggage claim is on level zero. Check the screens.
responses.phonetic: lah lee-vreh-ZOHN day bah-GAZH eh toh nee-VOH zay-ROH. vay-ree-fee-AY layz ay-KRAHN
responses.french: La livraison des bagages est au niveau zéro. Vérifiez les écrans.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the check-in desks are for your airline
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les comptoirs d'enregistrement de ma compagnie aérienne ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay kohn-TWAR dahn-ruh-zhee-struh-MAHN duh mah kohm-pahn-YEE ay-ryehn
phrases.cultural_note: Check-in counters are in the departure halls of each terminal. Both Orly 1 and Orly 4 have separate check-in areas for different airlines. If your terminal is unclear, check the Aéroports de Paris app or your airline's confirmation for the correct terminal number.

responses.english: The check-in desks are on level one.
responses.phonetic: lay kohn-TWAHR dahn-ruh-zhees-truh-MAHN sohn toh nee-VOH uhn
responses.french: Les comptoirs d'enregistrement sont au niveau un.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the airport pharmacy is
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une pharmacie dans l'aéroport ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon far-mah-SEE dahn lay-roh-POR
phrases.cultural_note: Orly has pharmacies airside (past security) in both terminals. Medical services (infirmerie) are also available for emergencies. If you need medication before departing France, a pharmacy in the terminal can advise and sell over-the-counter remedies.

responses.english: The pharmacy is in the terminal, after security.
responses.phonetic: lah far-mah-SEE eh dahn luh tehr-mee-NAL, ah-PREH lah say-koo-ree-TAY
responses.french: La pharmacie est dans le terminal, après la sécurité.
